props.ChoiceText: You made the kind of shot that becomes a story before the day is over, and thereafter every superior expected you to be the same man on command.
props.ChoiceBio: One impossible shot made your name, but fame for a bowman proved as demanding as it was flattering.

0.TransitionText: Because one impossible shot made your name, but fame for a bowman proved as demanding as it was flattering, bow, distance, and patience remained the shape of your life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Archer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because one impossible shot made your name, but fame for a bowman proved as demanding as it was flattering, skill and steadiness pushed you toward command over other fighting men.
1.TransitionPrompt: The shot put you in front of officers who now see you as more than a common bowman. Will you try to step toward command?

2.TransitionText: Because one impossible shot made your name, but fame for a bowman proved as demanding as it was flattering, you remained in the line and learned to live under the weight of expectation.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Archer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
